rationale: The cited 2006 JMRK paper directly studies individual-level ad-response heterogeneity and shows profitability gains from targeted allocation, which aligns closely with the citing paper’s core question of quantifying gains from individual-level targeting. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior targeting work that treated marketing actions as exogenous, making this cited study a plausible foundational/comparison prior rather than an incidental mention (with an exact DOI match).
